metadata.name: predict
metadata.description: World (world.xyz) prediction-markets core program. REVERSE-ENGINEERED from live mainnet data on 2026-07-02 (no official IDL exists). Discriminators (all 12 instructions + 5 events) re-derived via sha256('global:'/'event:')[:8] and byte-verified. Items marked (VERIFIED) in docs are byte-checked against live txs; items marked (INFERRED) are best-effort and need a verification pass before production use. CASH collateral has 6 decimals. Sibling router program 'Janus' is NOT Anchor and is not covered by this IDL; user trades are best read from DFlow SwapEvents (see dflow/dflow.json).

instructions.name: split
docs: VERIFIED. Lock `amount` CASH collateral and mint an equal `amount` of BOTH outcome tokens (A and B). Emits no event; derive effects from args + token balance deltas.
NOTE: authority is the trader on direct calls, or the Janus global vault PDA (FuNgUdjWtHTQq6mEzGjcfTcmCZWbESrBoK8ywyADV5tu) when CPI-routed during market making.

accounts.name: market
docs: Market state PDA — use as the market key.

args.name: amount
docs: CASH base units (6 decimals).

instructions.name: merge
docs: VERIFIED. Exact inverse of `split`: burn `amount` of BOTH outcome tokens and release `amount` CASH. Emits no event.

args.name: amount
docs: CASH base units (6 decimals).

instructions.name: redeem_outcome
docs: VERIFIED. Redeem `amount` of the winning outcome token 1:1 for CASH after resolution. Emits OutcomeRedeemed.

args.name: amount
docs: Winning outcome tokens to redeem (6 decimals).

instructions.name: redeem_outcome_for_user
docs: VERIFIED discriminator; args = none. Ops-triggered redemption on behalf of a user. Emits OutcomeRedeemed.
INFERRED: 15-account layout not fully reverse-engineered; accounts intentionally left empty.

instructions.name: burn_worthless_outcome
docs: VERIFIED discriminator; args = none. Burns losing (worthless) outcome tokens after resolution. Emits no event.
INFERRED: 5-account layout not fully reverse-engineered; accounts intentionally left empty.

instructions.name: initialize_market
docs: Ops-only. Creates the market PDA + two outcome mints. Emits MarketInitialized.
VERIFIED: header fields (nonce, oracle_type, feed_id, window_start_ms, window_end_ms) and the outcome vec {name, symbol, uri}.

INFERRED / NOT BYTE-EXACT: the `reserved` region (Option::None fields) between window_end_ms and the outcome vec, plus ~6 trailing bytes, are not modeled precisely — a strict borsh round-trip is not guaranteed. In practice parse the outcome mint from the last path segment of each uri (https://m.world.xyz/<outcome_mint>).
Cadence observed: a fresh 'BTC Up / BTC Down' market every 15 minutes (:00/:15/:30/:45).

accounts.name: authority
docs: Ops wallet DDucv2DeUsTsg1rfAcWAnUSUVpqfdHEzxX66ARB2JYVg.

args.name: nonce
docs: Unique per-market seed.

args.name: oracle_type
docs: 1 = Chainlink Data Streams.

args.name: feed_id
docs: Chainlink Data Streams feed id. BTC/USD = 0x00039d9e45394f473ab1f050a1b963e6b05351e52d71e507509ada0c95ed75b8.

args.name: window_start_ms
docs: Market window start, unix milliseconds.

args.name: window_end_ms
docs: Market window end, unix ms (start + 900000 for 15-min markets).

args.name: reserved
docs: INFERRED filler for Option::None fields; not byte-exact.

args.name: outcomes
docs: Do not assume exactly 2 — parse the vec length (layout supports N outcomes).

instructions.name: determine_outcome
docs: Ops-only. Records the resolution result. Emits MarketDetermined.
VERIFIED: arg is `payout_bps: u16` (payout numerator per 10,000). Observed 0 and 10000 — 10000 = one side pays in full, 0 = the other. This is NOT an outcome index.
INFERRED: which outcome (A vs B) the numerator refers to — pin once via a resolved market's redemptions (OutcomeRedeemed.outcome_mint).

args.name: payout_bps
docs: Payout numerator per 10,000 (0 or 10000 observed).

instructions.name: close_market
docs: VERIFIED discriminator; args = none. Closes a resolved market. Emits MarketClosed.
INFERRED: full 11-account layout not reverse-engineered; only the trailing Anchor emit_cpi accounts are known.

instructions.name: update_metadata
docs: VERIFIED discriminator. Emits MarketMetadataUpdated.

INFERRED: 96-byte arg blob only partially decoded — version/kind/feed_id are readable, the remainder (oracle checkpoint values + flags) is not resolved. Modeled as fixed bytes; not needed for trade/market indexing.

args.name: rest
docs: INFERRED: oracle checkpoint values + flags, not decoded.

instructions.name: create_user_settings
docs: VERIFIED discriminator; args = none. INFERRED: 4-account layout not reverse-engineered.

instructions.name: update_user_settings
docs: VERIFIED discriminator; 1-byte arg. INFERRED: field meaning + 2-account layout not reverse-engineered.

instructions.name: close_user_settings
docs: VERIFIED discriminator; args = none. INFERRED: 3-account layout not reverse-engineered.

fields.name: uri
docs: https://m.world.xyz/<outcome_mint>; last path segment is the outcome mint.

types.name: MarketInitialized
docs: 270-byte payload. First 5 pubkeys VERIFIED; oracle-config tail INFERRED (mirrors initialize_market header).

types.name: MarketClosed
docs: 32-byte payload. VERIFIED.

types.name: MarketDetermined
docs: 34-byte payload. VERIFIED. payout_bps mirrors the determine_outcome arg (0 or 10000).

types.name: OutcomeRedeemed
docs: 177-byte payload. VERIFIED. cash_paid_out == outcome_tokens_burned when payout_bps=10000.

fields.name: outcome_tokens_burned
docs: 6 decimals.

fields.name: cash_paid_out
docs: 6 decimals.

types.name: MarketMetadataUpdated
docs: 144-byte payload. INFERRED: only the leading market pubkey is resolved; remainder left as raw bytes.
